name: PER_LDAP_ROLES
description: Table for storing one record for each Role Addition or Removal to be processed in OIM

columns.Name: LDAP_ROLE_ID
columns.Comments: Mandatory Primary Key. Updatable while new key generation.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LDAP_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to LDAP request

columns.Name: REQUEST_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of request to perform: ADD, REMOVE

columns.Name: REQUEST_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of this part of the request: REQUEST, IN PROGRESS, COMPLETE, REJECTED

columns.Name: ROLE_GUID
columns.Comments: The role Guid of the role that is to be added as a member of another role (is renamed from PARENT_ROLE_GUID).

columns.Name: PARENT_ROLE_GUID
columns.Comments: The role Guid of the role that is the parent of the role to be added.

columns.Name: ROLE_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of the role being added

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: The description of the role being added

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ROLE_COMMON_NAME
columns.Comments: Role common name

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_ID
columns.Comments: EXTERNAL_ID

columns.Name: ROLE_TYPE
columns.Comments: ROLE_TYPE

columns.Name: APPLICATION
columns.Comments: APPLICATION
